name: biomedical-agent-teams
description: BMAT for Codex v0.8.0: a Codex-native biomedical workflow router for evidence audit, public-omics analysis, hypothesis tournaments, experiment design, translational scouting, loop-state validation, tool-use/result integration, golden eval gates, and validator-backed artifact bundles.

interface.shortDescription: BMAT for Codex 0.8.0: lazy-loaded biomedical audit, omics, hypothesis, loop, and validator workflows.
interface.longDescription: BMAT for Codex v0.8.0 is a Codex-native biomedical workflow suite for structured life-science research. It uses a lightweight SKILL.md router with lazy-loaded command recipes, runtime capability preflight, source corpus lock, fixed-field claim ledger, tool-use/result integration, research overview synthesis, hypothesis tournament checks, public-omics routing, experiment-design and translational-scout workflows, loop-state validation, selective reviewer lanes, dependency-aware team DAG outputs, post-write validation, golden-case eval gates for PMID drift, contradiction, overclaim, ranking honesty, and runtime mismatch, and validator-backed artifact checks with explicit downgrade handling.
defaultPrompt: biomedical-research-council TET2 KO plus IL-21 armored CAR-T persistence hypothesis
omics-analysis-team find public datasets to test IL-21-STAT3-FOXO1 stem-like memory signatures
evidence-audit-team verify this CAR-T mechanism claim with primary literature and public databases
